note: The McCluster ecosystem, sorted into segments. Each brand gets its own landing page at brand.html?brand=<slug>. ecosystem.html renders every segment. Add a brand by dropping an object into the right segment's list — the pages build themselves.

segments.title: Owned & Controlled
segments.label: The McCluster Ecosystem
segments.blurb: Brands McCluster Corp owns and operates end to end — the movements, the businesses, and the catalogue behind them.

segments.title: Vendors & Production Partners
segments.label: Who We Build With
segments.blurb: Independent producers and studios that supply craft into the ecosystem — hired in, credited out.

segments.title: Affiliates & Outside Providers
segments.label: Partners Beyond the House
segments.blurb: Outside brands and partner organizations McCluster represents, promotes, or has served — related but independently owned.

brands.name: McCluster Corp
brands.tagline: The parent house — creative direction and civic infrastructure under one roof.
brands.summary: McCluster Corp is the creative and civic company behind everything on this site — the Equity Uprise fellowship, the McCluster Service Network, the PRIM3 education program, and the Here / PRIM3 music catalogue. A registered Connecticut public charity, it turns media, policy, and technology into a single operating system.

highlights.title: One operating system
highlights.body: Policy, music, media, and outreach run as a single platform rather than separate campaigns.

highlights.title: On the public record
highlights.body: Recognized by the State of Georgia and the City of Bridgeport; registered as a public charity in Connecticut.

highlights.title: Owner-operated
highlights.body: Every frame, chord, and line of code across the ecosystem is built in-house by Matthew McCluster.

brands.name: Equity Uprise
brands.tagline: Not left, not right — forward. A civic platform where your talent is the superpower.
brands.summary: Equity Uprise is McCluster Corp's civic-engagement fellowship — policy, music, media, and voter outreach fused into one movement. It ran the Docket 516R fight against a 7.3-mile monopole build, took the case from public filing to a court remand, and put the whole record on the wall for anyone to read.

highlights.title: The Movement
highlights.body: A grassroots rally on environmental injustice — sound, staging, and program engineered from the booth for hundreds of attendees.

highlights.title: The Evidence Room
highlights.body: One power company, two cities that fought back, and a court that sent the case back for a rematch — archived and explained in plain English.

highlights.title: The Fellowship
highlights.body: A civic operating system: submit an anthem, launch an outreach campaign, or apply for a verified profile.

brands.name: PRIM3
brands.tagline: Build real infrastructure — from the schematics to a working data center.
brands.summary: PRIM3 is the ecosystem's technology-and-education program. It teaches kids and adults to build real infrastructure — reading the schematics, standing up a working data center, and managing it on site — and it ships the lessons with a soundtrack so they stick like a hook.

highlights.title: Part I — Infrastructure
highlights.body: From half-built room to managed data center: real hardware, real hands, taught from the ground up.

highlights.title: Part II — Education through music
highlights.body: Original tracks kids study to, so the curriculum lands like a chorus. Headphones on. Got WiFi.

brands.name: Whip Equipped LLC
brands.tagline: A parts-licensed dealership that became a story.
brands.summary: Whip Equipped LLC is a parts-licensed automotive dealership organized out of Acworth, Georgia in 2024 — and a piece of media at the same time. The lot runs day-to-day sales and compliance while doubling as the set for "We In This Together," an interactive mini-series scored by "Dealer Plates."

highlights.title: The business
highlights.body: Sourcing, sales, parts licensing, and compliance — a real dealership, run day to day.

highlights.title: The web series
highlights.body: An interactive thriller: choose actions during your watch and change the outcome of the story.

highlights.title: The crossover
highlights.body: A dealership campaign disguised as a crime saga, scored by "Dealer Plates," produced by Zakir & McCluster.

brands.name: McCluster Service Network
brands.tagline: Who did the shoot? Photography, recording, and broadcast — one network.
brands.summary: The McCluster Service Network is the creative-services arm — photography, recording, and broadcast production booked through one loadout. It's the crew behind the campaigns, the sound behind the movements, and the answer to the question every credit asks: who did the shoot?

facts.label: Rig
facts.value: A7R V · 2× RS 4 Pro · A7R IV

highlights.title: Photography
highlights.body: Full-frame stills and motion, lit and directed end to end.

highlights.title: Recording
highlights.body: Original scoring and session work — the catalogue that scores every program.

highlights.title: Broadcast
highlights.body: Live streaming, multi-cam, and event production run from the booth.

brands.name: Here — The Album
brands.tagline: The catalogue that scores the whole ecosystem.
brands.summary: Here is the McCluster music catalogue — the original songs behind every program on this site. Each track doubles as the score for a movement, a business, or a lesson: "Environmental Injustice" for the Uprise, "Dealer Plates" for Whip Equipped, "Got WiFi" for PRIM3, "Please Set Me Free" for the civic poll.

highlights.title: Every track has a job
highlights.body: The songs aren't a side project — each one scores a specific movement, business, or lesson.

highlights.title: Own the record
highlights.body: Every track gets its own page; the full catalogue is browsable and purchasable.

links.label: Please Set Me Free — the civic poll

brands.name: Zakir
brands.tagline: Producer and guitarist — the sound partner across the catalogue.
brands.summary: Zakir is the independent production partner behind key records in the catalogue — co-producing "Dealer Plates" for Whip Equipped and playing the live runway guitar on the Vaunt jingle. Hired in for craft, credited out on the record: the model for how the ecosystem works with outside talent.

highlights.title: Dealer Plates
highlights.body: Co-produced the score for the Whip Equipped mini-series — Zakir & McCluster.

highlights.title: Vaunt, live
highlights.body: Played the original jingle live on the runway that became the launch campaign.

brands.name: Vaunt Private Flights
brands.tagline: Private aviation — McCluster was the first influencer in the beta.
brands.summary: Vaunt Private Flights is an outside private-aviation brand McCluster represents as an affiliate. As the first influencer in their beta program, McCluster produced the launch coverage — an original jingle performed live on the runway that drove online sign-ups before the app even launched.

highlights.title: Commercial production
highlights.body: The spot performed live on the runway with Zakir on guitar — the jingle that became the campaign.

highlights.title: Launch campaign
highlights.body: Coverage that drove online sign-ups before the app even launched.

brands.name: F.R.E.E.D.O.M. Inc.
brands.tagline: Community partner — the digital front McCluster built and ran.
brands.summary: F.R.E.E.D.O.M. Inc. is an independent Bridgeport community organization McCluster served as its digital marketing and outreach platform manager — running social channels, outreach workflows, and weekly live broadcasts. A partner brand: independently owned, powered on the digital side by McCluster.

highlights.title: Digital front
highlights.body: Social channels, outreach workflows, and community contact systems, moved from paper into modern platforms.

highlights.title: Weekly broadcasts
highlights.body: Live streaming, recording, and media production for public programming.
